app.name: FastWayShare
app.description: Transfer files directly between devices, end-to-end encrypted. No server storage. 100% peer-to-peer.
hero.eyebrow: Browser to browser • No registration • 100% Free
hero.subtitle: Send photos, videos, or documents directly from your device to another in real-time. No size limits, no sign-ups, and your files never touch the cloud.
room.share_code: Share this room code with the recipient
room.waiting: Waiting for the other peer to connect...
drop.title: Drag & drop files here
drop.subtitle: Or click to browse • Images, videos, documents, folders — no size limits
connection.direct_tooltip: Great! Your devices are connected directly — fastest possible speed.
connection.relay_tooltip: Connected via a relay server due to network restrictions. Still encrypted.
history.title: Transfer history
history.empty: No transfers yet in this session.
hash.title: SHA-256 Integrity
hash.description: Compare these hashes on both devices to verify the file was not altered.
how.title: How it works under the hood
how.subtitle: FastWayShare leverages modern WebRTC technology to transfer your files directly, privately, and securely.
how.step1_desc: Devices use a signaling server to exchange network metadata (ICE candidates) and find each other. The server only facilitates the handshake and never sees your files.
how.step2_desc: Browsers perform an Elliptic-Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) key agreement to establish a secure, shared AES-256 key locally. The key is never sent over the network.
how.step3_desc: A direct WebRTC peer-to-peer connection is opened. Files are split into chunks and sent fully encrypted from browser to browser with no intermediary.
how.step4_desc: A SHA-256 checksum is calculated in real-time to verify that the received file is byte-for-byte identical to the original. Once complete, the session is terminated.
error.room_create: Could not create room. Please try again.
error.room_join: Invalid room code. Please check and try again.
error.connection: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
room.pwd_desc: The sender has protected this transfer with an extra password. Enter it to download.
error.browser: Your browser does not support WebRTC. Please use a modern browser.
footer.never_touch: Your files never touch our servers.
room.enter_code_desc: Enter the room code you received:
room.send_dropzone_desc: Drag and drop your files here
options.title: Advanced Options
options.aes_key_desc: If left blank, key is generated automatically via ECDH.
options.ultra_local: Ultra Local Mode (Detect same Wi-Fi & bypass TURN)
how.tech_subtitle: High-performance engine designed for speed, resilience, and maximum security.
how.tech1_desc: Bypasses TURN relays when devices share the same Wi-Fi network, ensuring maximum LAN speeds.
how.tech2_desc: Multiplexes files across multiple WebRTC DataChannels in parallel to overcome packet losses and boost throughput.
how.tech3_desc: Dynamically scales chunk size based on real-time RTT and jitter tracking to optimize pipeline efficiency.
how.tech4_desc: Optionally secure transfers with user passphrase key derivation using PBKDF2 on top of standard WebRTC encryption.
how.tech5_desc: Skips transmission of already received file chunks during resume attempts, saving valuable bandwidth.
how.tech6_desc: Implements Screen Wake Lock, background transfer awareness, and automatic reconnection triggers.
